deny.reason: Agents may not terminate EC2 instances in the Dark Factory MVP.
Agents may not mutate IAM in the Dark Factory MVP.
Agents may not read secrets directly; secrets are only consumed by bootstrap.
MCP agents may not create GitHub pull requests without explicit approval.
OpenAI Agents SDK tools may not create GitHub pull requests without explicit approval.
External A2A agents may not request GitHub write actions without explicit approval.
